VAL-UI-031.evidence: Screenshots taken in light mode (VAL-UI-031_light_mode.png) and dark mode (VAL-UI-031_dark_mode.png). Clicking 'Toggle theme' button switched entire UI to dark theme — background, sidebar, header, and charts all changed to dark colors. No console errors.
VAL-UI-031.notes: Dark mode toggle is a sun/moon icon button labeled 'Toggle theme' in the header. Theme switch is immediate with no flicker.

VAL-UI-032.evidence: Screenshots at mobile 375px (VAL-UI-032_mobile_375px.png), tablet 768px (VAL-UI-032_tablet_768px.png), and desktop 1920px (VAL-UI-032_desktop_1920px.png). Mobile: sidebar collapses to hamburger menu, content stacks vertically. Tablet: sidebar collapses, content uses full width with larger chart. Desktop: full sidebar visible with expanded navigation links and wide chart area.
VAL-UI-032.notes: Responsive breakpoints work correctly. Sidebar collapses at both mobile and tablet widths, and chart layout adapts appropriately.

VAL-UI-035.evidence: Screenshot sequence: Dashboard (/dashboard) -> Shared Links (/dashboard/share) -> Activity Log (/dashboard/audit) -> Settings (/dashboard/settings). All sidebar links navigate to the correct pages. Screenshots: VAL-UI-035_nav_dashboard.png, VAL-UI-035_nav_shares.png, VAL-UI-035_nav_audit.png, VAL-UI-035_nav_settings.png.
VAL-UI-035.notes: Sidebar links are: Dashboard, Shared Links, Activity Log, Settings. All navigate correctly to their respective routes.

VAL-UI-039.evidence: Screenshot of 404 page (VAL-UI-039_404_page.png). Navigating to /nonexistent-route shows custom 404 page with heart icon, '404' heading, 'Page not found' text, description, and 'Go Home' button linking back to home.
VAL-UI-039.notes: Custom 404 page renders correctly with clear messaging and a link back to home.

VAL-CROSS-008.evidence: Screenshot of dashboard with seeded data (VAL-CROSS-008_dashboard_seeded_data.png). After signing in as test@totus.dev, the dashboard shows Oura Ring connected, metric selectors for Sleep/Cardio/Activity categories, and interactive time-series charts with Sleep Score, Heart Rate Variability, and Resting Heart Rate data plotted over the date range Dec 9, 2025 – Mar 9, 2026.
VAL-CROSS-008.notes: Seed data is visible with 90 data points per metric across 8 metric types. Charts render correctly with Recharts.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Dark mode toggle switches entire UI including charts (VAL-UI-031). Responsive layout adapts correctly at mobile/tablet/desktop widths (VAL-UI-032). Sidebar navigation works for all 4 pages (VAL-UI-035). Custom 404 page renders with Go Home link (VAL-UI-039). Seed data visible in dashboard charts (VAL-CROSS-008). No console errors detected.
